Japan.US: Visa free (up to 90 days for tourism)
Japan.EU: Visa free (up to 90 days for tourism)
Japan.IN: eVisa required (easily applied online, up to 90 days)
Japan.AU: Visa free (up to 90 days for tourism)
Japan.CA: Visa free (up to 90 days for tourism)
Japan.other: Check with nearest Japanese Embassy or Consulate.

France.US: Visa free (Schengen Zone rules, up to 90 days)
France.IN: Schengen Visa required (must apply at Embassy/Consulate)
France.AU: Visa free (Schengen Zone rules, up to 90 days)
France.CA: Visa free (Schengen Zone rules, up to 90 days)
France.other: Schengen visa requirements apply for most non-exempt passport holders.

Italy.US: Visa free (Schengen Zone rules, up to 90 days)
Italy.IN: Schengen Visa required (must apply at Embassy/Consulate)
Italy.AU: Visa free (Schengen Zone rules, up to 90 days)
Italy.CA: Visa free (Schengen Zone rules, up to 90 days)

United Kingdom.US: Visa free (up to 6 months for tourism)
United Kingdom.EU: Visa free (up to 6 months for tourism)
United Kingdom.AU: Visa free (up to 6 months for tourism)
United Kingdom.CA: Visa free (up to 6 months for tourism)
United Kingdom.other: Check UK government visa eligibility website.

United States.IN: B1/B2 Visitor Visa required (embassy interview required)
United States.CA: Visa free (with Canadian Passport, some restrictions)

Indonesia.US: Visa on Arrival (VOA) required (30 days, extendable)
Indonesia.EU: Visa on Arrival (VOA) required (30 days, extendable)
Indonesia.IN: Visa on Arrival (VOA) required (30 days, extendable)
Indonesia.AU: Visa on Arrival (VOA) required (30 days, extendable)
Indonesia.CA: Visa on Arrival (VOA) required (30 days, extendable)

Australia.US: ETA required (electronic visa applied via App)
Australia.CA: ETA required (electronic visa applied via App)
